title: Hammerhead
body:
# **Hammerhead for 1.21.0**

## History
Originally this data pack was made by an unknown author, and our local server was a big fan. I updated the mod and added additional blocks in 1.18. Today- finally, we have a 1.21.0 update. Nethrite picks have been added. The original Planet Minecraft page can be found [here.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/hammerhead-5396323/)

## How It Works
If you have 10 levels of experience and place an Iron, Diamond, or Netherite pickaxe, along with an Iron Block on top of an Enchantment table. Your pickaxe will be turned into a Hammer! Hammers can mine a 3x3 area in front of where you're looking.

Shovels (Iron, Diamond, and Netherite) can also be turned into hammers.

## Pickaxe Hammerable Blocks
- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Polished Andesite
- Polished Diorite
- Polished Granite
- Stone
- Cobblestone
- End Stone
- Netherrack
- Sandstone
- Chiseled Sandstone
- Cut Sandstone
- Smooth Sandstone
- Red Sandstone
- Chiseled Red Sandstone
- Cut Red Sandstone
- Smooth Red Sandstone
- Stone Bricks
- Mossy Stone Bricks
- Cracked Stone Bricks
- Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Tuff
- Deepslate
- Cobbled Deepslate
- Blackstone
- Basalt
- Smooth Basalt
- Calcite
- Dripstone Block
- Nether Bricks
- Terracotta
- White Terracotta
- Light Gray Terracotta
- Brown Terracotta
- Orange Terracotta
- Red Terracotta
- Yellow Terracotta

## Shovel Hammerable Blocks
- Dirt
- Grass Block
- Podzol
- Sand
- Red Sand
- Gravel
- Coarse Dirt
